policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-amo-07 - Azure Monitor Data Collection Rules: Restrict Data Collection Endpoint'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Azure+Monitor#IncidentremediationAzureMonitor-drcp-amo-07 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Azure Monitor Data Collection Rules Restrict Data Collection Endpoint
policyDefinition.description: This policy denies the use of a Data Collection Endpoint on a Data Collection Rule that resides outside of the current subscription.

drcp.name: MonitorDataCollectionRulesEndpoint
drcp.controlDesc: Azure Monitor Data Collection Rules: Restrict Data Collection Endpoint

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
